evals.prompt: REDUNDANT-1 — isUniqueViolation is copy-pasted in auth, user, and client services. extract it to a shared utility and update all imports
evals.expected_output: Creates src/core/db-utils.ts with isUniqueViolation. Updates imports in auth.service.ts, user.service.ts, client.service.ts. Deletes all 3 local copies. Adds unit test for the shared utility.

evals.prompt: fix REDUNDANT-2 and REDUNDANT-3 — the OAuth client mapping is duplicated and TOTP construction appears 3 times in mfa.service.ts
evals.expected_output: Exports mapToClientResponse from client module barrel, imports in oauth.service.ts, deletes mapOAuthClientRow. Extracts createTotpInstance helper in mfa.service.ts, replaces 3 construction sites. All tests pass.

evals.prompt: POST /api/users bypasses the entire registration flow and any authenticated user can create accounts. remove it per REDUNDANT-5
evals.expected_output: Removes POST route from user.routes.ts. Updates or removes related tests. Verifies no frontend code depends on this endpoint. Barrel exports updated if needed.
